skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem:
3a + 10b = 215

3a + 4b = 95

The solution to the given system of equations is (a, b). What is the value of b?
rationale: Subtracting the second equation from the first eliminates a: (3a − 3a) + (10b − 4b) = 215 − 95, so 6b = 120 and b = 20.
